ayahs.arabic: حمٓ
ayahs.translation: Ḥā, Meem.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱلْكِتَـٰبِ ٱلْمُبِينِ
ayahs.translation: By the clear Book,

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّآ أَنزَلْنَـٰهُ فِى لَيْلَةٍ مُّبَـٰرَكَةٍ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُنذِرِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We sent it down during a blessed night. Indeed, We were to warn [mankind].
ayahs.transliteration: Inna anzalnahu fee laylatin mubarakatininna kunna munthireen

ayahs.arabic: فِيهَا يُفْرَقُ كُلُّ أَمْرٍ حَكِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: Therein [i.e., on that night] is made distinct every precise matter -

ayahs.arabic: أَمْرًا مِّنْ عِندِنَآ ۚ إِنَّا كُنَّا مُرْسِلِينَ
ayahs.translation: [Every] matter [proceeding] from Us. Indeed, We were to send [a messenger]

ayahs.arabic: رَحْمَةً مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلسَّمِيعُ ٱلْعَلِيمُ
ayahs.translation: As mercy from your Lord. Indeed, He is the Hearing, the Knowing,
ayahs.transliteration: Rahmatan min rabbika innahu huwa assameeAAualAAaleem

ayahs.arabic: رَبِّ ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضِ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَآ ۖ إِن كُنتُم مُّوقِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: Lord of the heavens and the earth and that between them, if you would be certain.
ayahs.transliteration: Rabbi assamawati wal-ardiwama baynahuma in kuntum mooqineen

ayahs.arabic: لَآ إِلَـٰهَ إِلَّا هُوَ يُحْىِۦ وَيُمِيتُ ۖ رَبُّكُمْ وَرَبُّ ءَابَآئِكُمُ ٱلْأَوَّلِينَ
ayahs.translation: There is no deity except Him; He gives life and causes death. [He is] your Lord and the Lord of your first forefathers.
ayahs.transliteration: La ilaha illa huwa yuhyeewayumeetu rabbukum warabbu aba-ikumu al-awwaleen

ayahs.arabic: بَلْ هُمْ فِى شَكٍّ يَلْعَبُونَ
ayahs.translation: But they are in doubt, amusing themselves.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ يَوْمَ تَأْتِى ٱلسَّمَآءُ بِدُخَانٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.translation: Then watch for the Day when the sky will bring a visible smoke

ayahs.arabic: يَغْشَى ٱلنَّاسَ ۖ هَـٰذَا عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: Covering the people; this is a painful torment.

ayahs.arabic: رَّبَّنَا ٱكْشِفْ عَنَّا ٱلْعَذَابَ إِنَّا مُؤْمِنُونَ
ayahs.translation: [They will say], "Our Lord, remove from us the torment; indeed, we are believers."

ayahs.arabic: أَنَّىٰ لَهُمُ ٱلذِّكْرَىٰ وَقَدْ جَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.translation: How will there be for them a reminder [at that time]? And there had come to them a clear Messenger.
ayahs.transliteration: Anna lahumu aththikrawaqad jaahum rasoolun mubeen

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ تَوَلَّوْا۟ عَنْهُ وَقَالُوا۟ مُعَلَّمٌ مَّجْنُونٌ
ayahs.translation: Then they turned away from him and said, "[He was] taught [and is] a madman."

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّا كَاشِفُوا۟ ٱلْعَذَابِ قَلِيلًا ۚ إِنَّكُمْ عَآئِدُونَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, We will remove the torment for a little. Indeed, you [disbelievers] will return [to disbelief].

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ نَبْطِشُ ٱلْبَطْشَةَ ٱلْكُبْرَىٰٓ إِنَّا مُنتَقِمُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day We will strike with the greatest assault, indeed, We will take retribution.

ayahs.arabic: ۞ وَلَقَدْ فَتَنَّا قَبْلَهُمْ قَوْمَ فِرْعَوْنَ وَجَآءَهُمْ رَسُولٌ كَرِيمٌ
ayahs.translation: And We had already tried before them the people of Pharaoh, and there came to them a noble messenger [i.e., Moses],
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad fatanna qablahum qawmafirAAawna wajaahum rasoolun kareem

ayahs.arabic: أَنْ أَدُّوٓا۟ إِلَىَّ عِبَادَ ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّى لَكُمْ رَسُولٌ أَمِينٌ
ayahs.translation: [Saying], "Render to me the servants of Allāh. Indeed, I am to you a trustworthy messenger,"
ayahs.transliteration: An addoo ilayya AAibada Allahiinnee lakum rasoolun ameen

ayahs.arabic: وَأَن لَّا تَعْلُوا۟ عَلَى ٱللَّهِ ۖ إِنِّىٓ ءَاتِيكُم بِسُلْطَـٰنٍ مُّبِينٍ
ayahs.translation: And [saying], "Be not haughty with Allāh. Indeed, I have come to you with clear evidence.
ayahs.transliteration: Waan la taAAloo AAala Allahiinnee ateekum bisultanin mubeen

ayahs.arabic: وَإِنِّى عُذْتُ بِرَبِّى وَرَبِّكُمْ أَن تَرْجُمُونِ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, I have sought refuge in my Lord and your Lord, lest you stone me.

ayahs.arabic: وَإِن لَّمْ تُؤْمِنُوا۟ لِى فَٱعْتَزِلُونِ
ayahs.translation: But if you do not believe me, then leave me alone."

ayahs.arabic: فَدَعَا رَبَّهُۥٓ أَنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ قَوْمٌ مُّجْرِمُونَ
ayahs.translation: And [finally] he called to his Lord that these were a criminal people.

ayahs.arabic: فَأَسْرِ بِعِبَادِى لَيْلًا إِنَّكُم مُّتَّبَعُونَ
ayahs.translation: [Allāh said], "Then set out with My servants by night. Indeed, you are to be pursued.

ayahs.arabic: وَٱتْرُكِ ٱلْبَحْرَ رَهْوًا ۖ إِنَّهُمْ جُندٌ مُّغْرَقُونَ
ayahs.translation: And leave the sea in stillness. Indeed, they are an army to be drowned."

ayahs.arabic: كَمْ تَرَكُوا۟ مِن جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.translation: How much they left behind of gardens and springs

ayahs.arabic: وَزُرُوعٍ وَمَقَامٍ كَرِيمٍ
ayahs.translation: And crops and noble sites

ayahs.arabic: وَنَعْمَةٍ كَانُوا۟ فِيهَا فَـٰكِهِينَ
ayahs.translation: And comfort wherein they were amused.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ ۖ وَأَوْرَثْنَـٰهَا قَوْمًا ءَاخَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: Thus. And We caused to inherit it another people.

ayahs.arabic: فَمَا بَكَتْ عَلَيْهِمُ ٱلسَّمَآءُ وَٱلْأَرْضُ وَمَا كَانُوا۟ مُنظَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: And the heaven and earth wept not for them, nor were they reprieved.
ayahs.transliteration: Fama bakat AAalayhimu assamaowal-ardu wama kanoo munthareen

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدْ نَجَّيْنَا بَنِىٓ إِسْرَٰٓءِيلَ مِنَ ٱلْعَذَابِ ٱلْمُهِينِ
ayahs.translation: And We certainly saved the Children of Israel from the humiliating torment -
ayahs.transliteration: Walaqad najjayna banee isra-eelamina alAAathabi almuheen

ayahs.arabic: مِن فِرْعَوْنَ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ كَانَ عَالِيًا مِّنَ ٱلْمُسْرِفِينَ
ayahs.translation: From Pharaoh. Indeed, he was a haughty one among the transgressors.
ayahs.transliteration: Min firAAawna innahu kana AAaliyanmina almusrifeen

ayahs.arabic: وَلَقَدِ ٱخْتَرْنَـٰهُمْ عَلَىٰ عِلْمٍ عَلَى ٱلْعَـٰلَمِينَ
ayahs.translation: And We certainly chose them by knowledge over [all] the worlds.

ayahs.arabic: وَءَاتَيْنَـٰهُم مِّنَ ٱلْـَٔايَـٰتِ مَا فِيهِ بَلَـٰٓؤٌا۟ مُّبِينٌ
ayahs.translation: And We gave them of signs that in which there was a clear trial.
ayahs.transliteration: Waataynahum mina al-ayatima feehi balaon mubeen

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰٓؤُلَآءِ لَيَقُولُونَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, these [disbelievers] are saying,

ayahs.arabic: إِنْ هِىَ إِلَّا مَوْتَتُنَا ٱلْأُولَىٰ وَمَا نَحْنُ بِمُنشَرِينَ
ayahs.translation: "There is not but our first death, and we will not be resurrected.
ayahs.transliteration: In hiya illa mawtatuna al-oolawama nahnu bimunshareen

ayahs.arabic: فَأْتُوا۟ بِـَٔابَآئِنَآ إِن كُنتُمْ صَـٰدِقِينَ
ayahs.translation: Then bring [back] our forefathers, if you should be truthful."

ayahs.arabic: أَهُمْ خَيْرٌ أَمْ قَوْمُ تُبَّعٍ وَٱلَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِهِمْ ۚ أَهْلَكْنَـٰهُمْ ۖ إِنَّهُمْ كَانُوا۟ مُجْرِمِينَ
ayahs.translation: Are they better or the people of Tubbaʿ and those before them? We destroyed them, [for] indeed, they were criminals.
ayahs.transliteration: Ahum khayrun am qawmu tubbaAAin wallatheenamin qablihim ahlaknahum innahum kanoo mujrimeen

ayahs.arabic: وَمَا خَلَقْنَا ٱلسَّمَـٰوَٰتِ وَٱلْأَرْضَ وَمَا بَيْنَهُمَا لَـٰعِبِينَ
ayahs.translation: And We did not create the heavens and earth and that between them in play.
ayahs.transliteration: Wama khalaqna assamawatiwal-arda wama baynahuma laAAibeen

ayahs.arabic: مَا خَلَقْنَـٰهُمَآ إِلَّا بِٱلْحَقِّ وَلَـٰكِنَّ أَكْثَرَهُمْ لَا يَعْلَمُونَ
ayahs.translation: We did not create them except in truth, but most of them do not know.
ayahs.transliteration: Ma khalaqnahuma illabilhaqqi walakinna aktharahum layaAAlamoon

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ يَوْمَ ٱلْفَصْلِ مِيقَـٰتُهُمْ أَجْمَعِينَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the Day of Judgement is the appointed time for them all -

ayahs.arabic: يَوْمَ لَا يُغْنِى مَوْلًى عَن مَّوْلًى شَيْـًٔا وَلَا هُمْ يُنصَرُونَ
ayahs.translation: The Day when no relation will avail a relation at all, nor will they be helped -
ayahs.transliteration: Yawma la yughnee mawlan AAan mawlanshay-an wala hum yunsaroon

ayahs.arabic: إِلَّا مَن رَّحِمَ ٱللَّهُ ۚ إِنَّهُۥ هُوَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلرَّحِيمُ
ayahs.translation: Except those [believers] on whom Allāh has mercy. Indeed, He is the Exalted in Might, the Merciful.
ayahs.transliteration: Illa man rahima Allahuinnahu huwa alAAazeezu arraheem

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ شَجَرَتَ ٱلزَّقُّومِ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the tree of zaqqūm

ayahs.arabic: طَعَامُ ٱلْأَثِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Is food for the sinful.

ayahs.arabic: كَٱلْمُهْلِ يَغْلِى فِى ٱلْبُطُونِ
ayahs.translation: Like murky oil, it boils within bellies

ayahs.arabic: كَغَلْىِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Like the boiling of scalding water.

ayahs.arabic: خُذُوهُ فَٱعْتِلُوهُ إِلَىٰ سَوَآءِ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.translation: [It will be commanded], "Seize him and drag him into the midst of the Hellfire,

ayahs.arabic: ثُمَّ صُبُّوا۟ فَوْقَ رَأْسِهِۦ مِنْ عَذَابِ ٱلْحَمِيمِ
ayahs.translation: Then pour over his head from the torment of scalding water."
ayahs.transliteration: Thumma subboo fawqa ra/sihi min AAathabialhameem

ayahs.arabic: ذُقْ إِنَّكَ أَنتَ ٱلْعَزِيزُ ٱلْكَرِيمُ
ayahs.translation: [It will be said], "Taste! Indeed, you are the honored, the noble!

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ هَـٰذَا مَا كُنتُم بِهِۦ تَمْتَرُونَ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, this is what you used to dispute."

ayahs.arabic: إِنَّ ٱلْمُتَّقِينَ فِى مَقَامٍ أَمِينٍ
ayahs.translation: Indeed, the righteous will be in a secure place:

ayahs.arabic: فِى جَنَّـٰتٍ وَعُيُونٍ
ayahs.translation: Within gardens and springs,

ayahs.arabic: يَلْبَسُونَ مِن سُندُسٍ وَإِسْتَبْرَقٍ مُّتَقَـٰبِلِينَ
ayahs.translation: Wearing [garments of] fine silk and brocade, facing each other.

ayahs.arabic: كَذَٰلِكَ وَزَوَّجْنَـٰهُم بِحُورٍ عِينٍ
ayahs.translation: Thus. And We will marry them to fair women with large, [beautiful] eyes.

ayahs.arabic: يَدْعُونَ فِيهَا بِكُلِّ فَـٰكِهَةٍ ءَامِنِينَ
ayahs.translation: They will call therein for every [kind of] fruit - safe and secure.

ayahs.arabic: لَا يَذُوقُونَ فِيهَا ٱلْمَوْتَ إِلَّا ٱلْمَوْتَةَ ٱلْأُولَىٰ ۖ وَوَقَىٰهُمْ عَذَابَ ٱلْجَحِيمِ
ayahs.translation: They will not taste death therein except the first death, and He will have protected them from the punishment of Hellfire
ayahs.transliteration: La yathooqoona feehaalmawta illa almawtata al-oola wawaqahum AAathabaaljaheem

ayahs.arabic: فَضْلًا مِّن رَّبِّكَ ۚ ذَٰلِكَ هُوَ ٱلْفَوْزُ ٱلْعَظِيمُ
ayahs.translation: As bounty from your Lord. That is what is the great attainment.
ayahs.transliteration: Fadlan min rabbika thalikahuwa alfawzu alAAatheem

ayahs.arabic: فَإِنَّمَا يَسَّرْنَـٰهُ بِلِسَانِكَ لَعَلَّهُمْ يَتَذَكَّرُونَ
ayahs.translation: And indeed, We have eased it [i.e., the Qur’ān] in your tongue that they might be reminded.

ayahs.arabic: فَٱرْتَقِبْ إِنَّهُم مُّرْتَقِبُونَ
ayahs.translation: So watch, [O Muḥammad]; indeed, they are watching [for your end].
